title: Chore: Improve error messages
original_text: Improved error messages across the application. Made error messages more user-friendly and actionable. Added error codes for easier debugging. Implemented error message localization. Added error context and suggestions. Updated error logging with structured data. Added tests for error message quality. Result: error messages improved.
expected_subject: chore(ux): improve error messages for better user experience
expected_body_lines: - Make error messages more user-friendly and actionable
- Add error codes for easier debugging
- Update error logging with structured data
expected_command: git commit -m "chore(ux): improve error messages for better user experience"
